METADATA.Authors and Contributors: Meire Domingos, Daniel Florez-Orrego, EPFL IPESE research group
METADATA.Description: SOEC model operating at thermoneutral mode (800 °C, 81% steam utilization), with activation, concentration and ohmic overpotentials included in Aspen PLUS
METADATA.Main Related Publication: Ni, M., Leung, M.K. and Leung, D.Y., 2006. Chemical Engineering & Technology: Industrial Chemistry Plant Equipment Process Engineering Biotechnology, 29(5), pp.636-642

VARIABLES.NAME: dtmin_gas
VARIABLES.FULL NAME: Minimum temperature difference for gas-side heat exchange

VARIABLES.NAME: dtmin_liq
VARIABLES.FULL NAME: Minimum temperature difference for liquid-side heat exchange

VARIABLES.NAME: dtmin_2ph
VARIABLES.FULL NAME: Minimum temperature difference for two-phase (condensing/boiling) heat exchange

VARIABLES.NAME: massflow_H2O_in
VARIABLES.FULL NAME: Inlet mass flow rate of water (H₂O)

VARIABLES.NAME: massflow_H2_out
VARIABLES.FULL NAME: Outlet mass flow rate of hydrogen (H₂)

VARIABLES.NAME: massflow_H2O_out
VARIABLES.FULL NAME: Outlet mass flow rate of water (H₂O)
VARIABLES.DESCRIPTION: sum of condensed water plus water recovered in sieves (1.55+0.29 kg/h)

VARIABLES.NAME: massflow_O2_N2
VARIABLES.FULL NAME: Mass flow rate of oxygen and nitrogen mixture (air exhaust)

VARIABLES.DESCRIPTION: Heat exchanger B3 – temperature at outlet

VARIABLES.FULL NAME: Electrical energy consumption of the SOEC (Solid Oxide Electrolyzer Cell)

SOECmodel.Operating Cost Description: The fixed and variable operating costs includes manpower, fixed cost of operation, taxes etc.
